description: Accounts in the hand of Shelomo b. Eliyyahu or his father Eliyyahu b. Zekharya. Dating: late 12th or early 13th century. Mentions people such as Sitt Ṭāwūs and Mubāraka; Yūsufīs (the Almohad gold currency); and several garments, especially sūsiyya (this is probably what the abbreviation samekh means) of various colors. ASE/AA
tags: Eliyyahu b. Zekharia, Shelomo b. Eliyyahu
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
